title: Heart Attack!
description: Don't get scared too much or your blood pressure will rise...
body:
# Heart Attack!

Heart Attack! adds blood pressure, also referred to as "Fear Meter", that rises when the player is, well, scared. Or at least when **you** should feel scared.


If your blood pressure gets too high, you risk a heart attack, so be careful!

### More versions
This mod is currently being ported by me to Forge 1.19 and Fabric 1.20.

### Discord
Feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/dEqpzZYxja) for more.
